response.overview: # Translation:  Tracing the story of Chinta and Raja Akid who come from dysfunctional family backgrounds, yet form two different personalities until they complement each other in overcoming their shortcomings and making their marriage successful. Chinta lives in misery with her father who often punishes her and finds fault in her. Meanwhile, Raja Akid has trauma towards women stemming from his mother's mistakes in relationships. Because of this, Raja Akid often avoids entering into relationships with any woman until he meets Chinta at his workplace. Chinta's presence in his life makes him more comfortable. However, Raja Akid is torn between his feelings for Chinta and his hatred towards women. Although both must face various complicated family problems, being by each other's side makes their lives feel happy.  **Novel Synopsis of Chinta:** A story about Chinta's life from her childhood when she was often sidelined by her father without clear reason.
response.title: Chinta Wrong Direction
